category_sources: source_facts.description: Go formatter that additionally inserts import statements; official Go package docs describe goimports as updating Go import lines.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: goimports; official Go package page is for golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official Go package documentation; source_facts.repo points to the official golang/tools repository containing cmd/goimports.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Go formatting and import insertion; official Go package docs say goimports adds missing imports and removes unreferenced ones.
